steps.title: Spot the contradiction between expectation and observation
steps.content: The passage first establishes the rule: debris outside the Roche limit “would likely accrete into a satellite.” Then it reports the observation: a ring outside the Roche limit “has remained intact.” These contradict each other.

steps.title: Select the transition that marks the contradiction
steps.content:
Though is the only choice that marks a contrast between two conflicting statements.

The other choices fail: for example signals support or illustration (not contrast), fittingly suggests appropriateness or logical fit (not conflict), and likewise indicates similarity or agreement (not opposition).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
